description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and some Greek/Coptic numerals. Mentions items such as galangal (khalanjān), applicators (marāwid), vessels (barānī), aflāj(?), locks (aqfāl), and maqṭaʿ cloths. Mentions people such as Abū ʿUmar; Sulaymān; and Ibn Ṣaghīr.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
